briefdescription.para: Apply the update's changes to the given metadata and snapshot.

parameterdescription.para: The base table metadata to apply changes to
Snapshot to apply the changes to

simplesect.para: A vector of manifest files for the new snapshot

briefdescription.para: Clean up any uncommitted manifests that were created.

detaileddescription.para: Manifests may not be committed if Apply is called multiple times because a commit conflict has occurred. Implementations may keep around manifests because the same changes will be made by both Apply calls. This method instructs the implementation to clean up those manifests and passes the paths of the manifests that were actually committed.

parameterdescription.para: A set of manifest paths that were actually committed

briefdescription.para: Get the summary map for this operation.
Constructor; reads merge configuration from table properties.
Stage a data file to be added to the table.
Stage a delete file to be added to the table.
Validate a delete file against the table format version rules.

listitem.para: Format v1: deletes are not supported.
Format v2: position deletes must NOT be deletion vectors (DVs).
Format v3+: position deletes MUST be deletion vectors (DVs).

briefdescription.para: Stage a delete file with an explicit data sequence number.
Add all files in a pre-existing data manifest to the new snapshot.

detaileddescription.para: The manifest must contain only appended data files. If snapshot ID inheritance is enabled and the manifest has no snapshot ID assigned, it is used directly; otherwise it is copied with the current snapshot ID.

briefdescription.para: Register a data file (by object) to be deleted from the table.
Register a delete file (by object) to be removed from the table.
Register a data file path to be deleted from the table.

simplesect.para: Only applies to data files. To remove delete files, use DeleteDeleteFile().

briefdescription.para: Register an expression to delete matching rows.

detaileddescription.para: Both data and delete filter managers receive the expression: delete files that match the row filter can also be removed because those rows will be deleted.

briefdescription.para: Register a partition to be dropped.

detaileddescription.para: Both data and delete filter managers receive the partition drop, since dropping data in a partition also drops all delete files in that partition.

briefdescription.para: Fail if any registered delete path is not found in any manifest.
Fail if any manifest entry matches a delete condition.
Override the data sequence number assigned to all newly-added data files.
Returns true if SetNewDataFilesDataSequenceNumber was called.
Set case sensitivity for row filter and expression evaluation.
Returns true if case-sensitive matching is enabled (default: true).
Returns true if any data files have been staged for addition.
Returns true if any delete files have been staged for addition.
Returns true if any data files have been registered for deletion.
Returns true if any delete files have been registered for removal.
Returns the row-filter expression set via DeleteByRowFilter, or nullptr.
Returns the single partition spec for all staged data files.

detaileddescription.para: Precondition: exactly one partition spec ID must be represented among staged data files.

briefdescription.para: Returns all data files staged for addition.

memberdef.argsstring: (const TableMetadata &metadata, std::optional< int64_t > starting_snapshot_id, const DataFileSet &replaced_files, const std::shared_ptr< Snapshot > &parent, std::shared_ptr< FileIO > io) const
memberdef.name: ValidateNoNewDeletesForDataFiles

briefdescription.para: Return an error if any snapshot after starting_snapshot_id, or from the beginning if unset, added a delete file that covers a file in replaced_files.

detaileddescription.para: Whether equality deletes are checked is derived automatically from whether a custom data sequence number was set via SetNewDataFilesDataSequenceNumber(): if set, equality deletes are ignored because they still apply to the rewritten files and are not a conflict.
Subclasses should prefer this overload over the static one.

memberdef.argsstring: (const TableMetadata &metadata, std::optional< int64_t > starting_snapshot_id, std::shared_ptr< Expression > conflict_filter, const std::shared_ptr< Snapshot > &parent, std::shared_ptr< FileIO > io) const
memberdef.name: ValidateAddedDVs

briefdescription.para: Return an error if a staged deletion vector conflicts with a deletion vector added since starting_snapshot_id.

memberdef.argsstring: (const TableMetadata &metadata, std::optional< int64_t > starting_snapshot_id, std::shared_ptr< Expression > filter, const std::shared_ptr< Snapshot > &parent, std::shared_ptr< FileIO > io, bool case_sensitive=true)
memberdef.name: ValidateAddedDataFiles

briefdescription.para: Return an error if any snapshot after starting_snapshot_id, or from the beginning if unset, added a data file matching the given filter expression.

memberdef.argsstring: (const TableMetadata &metadata, std::optional< int64_t > starting_snapshot_id, const PartitionSet &partition_set, const std::shared_ptr< Snapshot > &parent, std::shared_ptr< FileIO > io)
memberdef.name: ValidateAddedDataFiles

briefdescription.para: Return an error if any snapshot after starting_snapshot_id, or from the beginning if unset, added a data file in any partition of the given partition set.

memberdef.argsstring: (const TableMetadata &metadata, std::optional< int64_t > starting_snapshot_id, const std::unordered_set< std::string > &file_paths, bool skip_deletes, std::shared_ptr< Expression > filter, const std::shared_ptr< Snapshot > &parent, std::shared_ptr< FileIO > io, bool case_sensitive=true)
memberdef.name: ValidateDataFilesExist

briefdescription.para: Return an error if any snapshot after starting_snapshot_id, or from the beginning if unset, removed a file whose path is in file_paths (and skip_deletes is false).

memberdef.argsstring: (const TableMetadata &metadata, std::optional< int64_t > starting_snapshot_id, const DataFileSet &replaced_files, const std::shared_ptr< Snapshot > &parent, std::shared_ptr< FileIO > io, bool ignore_equality_deletes=false)
memberdef.name: ValidateNoNewDeletesForDataFiles

briefdescription.para: Return an error if any snapshot after starting_snapshot_id, or from the beginning if unset, added a delete file that covers a file in replaced_files.

parameterdescription.para: If true, only position deletes are checked. Set to true when replaced data files have the same sequence number as the new files (e.g. RewriteFiles), so equality deletes at higher sequence numbers still apply and are not a conflict.

memberdef.argsstring: (const TableMetadata &metadata, std::optional< int64_t > starting_snapshot_id, std::shared_ptr< Expression > data_filter, const DataFileSet &replaced_files, const std::shared_ptr< Snapshot > &parent, std::shared_ptr< FileIO > io, bool case_sensitive=true)
memberdef.name: ValidateNoNewDeletesForDataFiles

briefdescription.para: Return an error if any snapshot after starting_snapshot_id, or from the beginning if unset, added a delete file matching the data filter that covers a file in replaced_files.

memberdef.argsstring: (const TableMetadata &metadata, std::optional< int64_t > starting_snapshot_id, std::shared_ptr< Expression > data_filter, const std::shared_ptr< Snapshot > &parent, std::shared_ptr< FileIO > io, bool case_sensitive=true)
memberdef.name: ValidateNoNewDeleteFiles

briefdescription.para: Return an error if any snapshot after starting_snapshot_id, or from the beginning if unset, added a delete file matching the given row filter.

memberdef.argsstring: (const TableMetadata &metadata, std::optional< int64_t > starting_snapshot_id, const PartitionSet &partition_set, const std::shared_ptr< Snapshot > &parent, std::shared_ptr< FileIO > io)
memberdef.name: ValidateNoNewDeleteFiles

briefdescription.para: Return an error if any snapshot after starting_snapshot_id, or from the beginning if unset, added a delete file matching any partition in the given partition set.

memberdef.argsstring: (const TableMetadata &metadata, std::optional< int64_t > starting_snapshot_id, std::shared_ptr< Expression > data_filter, const std::shared_ptr< Snapshot > &parent, std::shared_ptr< FileIO > io, bool case_sensitive=true)
memberdef.name: ValidateDeletedDataFiles

briefdescription.para: Return an error if any snapshot after starting_snapshot_id, or from the beginning if unset, deleted a data file matching the given row filter.

memberdef.argsstring: (const TableMetadata &metadata, std::optional< int64_t > starting_snapshot_id, const PartitionSet &partition_set, const std::shared_ptr< Snapshot > &parent, std::shared_ptr< FileIO > io)
memberdef.name: ValidateDeletedDataFiles

briefdescription.para: Return an error if any snapshot after starting_snapshot_id, or from the beginning if unset, deleted a data file in any partition of the given partition set.

memberdef.argsstring: (const TableMetadata &metadata, std::optional< int64_t > starting_snapshot_id, std::shared_ptr< Expression > data_filter, std::shared_ptr< PartitionSet > partition_set, const std::shared_ptr< Snapshot > &parent, std::shared_ptr< FileIO > io, bool case_sensitive=true)
memberdef.name: AddedDeleteFiles

briefdescription.para: Build a DeleteFileIndex of delete files added since starting_snapshot_id.

memberdef.argsstring: (const TableMetadata &metadata, std::optional< int64_t > starting_snapshot_id, std::shared_ptr< Expression > conflict_filter, const std::unordered_set< std::string > &referenced_data_files, const std::shared_ptr< Snapshot > &parent, std::shared_ptr< FileIO > io, bool case_sensitive=true)
memberdef.name: ValidateAddedDVs

briefdescription.para: Return an error if any snapshot after starting_snapshot_id, or from the beginning if unset, added a deletion vector that conflicts with DVs being written.
Copy a manifest with the current snapshot ID, for use when snapshot ID inheritance is not possible.

parameterdescription.para: Whether to add copied entries to the append summary

briefdescription.para: Set a summary property.

detaileddescription.para: Implementations may override this to retain custom properties across retry-safe summary rebuilds.

briefdescription.para: Write new data manifests for staged data files; caches the result.
Write new delete manifests for staged delete files; caches the result.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::vector< ManifestFile > &manifests, const std::unordered_set< std::string > &committed, bool clear)
memberdef.name: DeleteUncommitted

briefdescription.para: Abstract base class for merge-based snapshot write operations.

detaileddescription.para: This class is the C++ counterpart of Java's MergingSnapshotProducer. It provides the shared filter, write, and merge pipeline used by operations that accumulate file additions and deletions, produce a new Snapshot, and commit that snapshot as current. Commit conflicts are resolved by applying the same staged changes to the new latest snapshot and reattempting the commit.
Subclasses describe their changes by calling the protected primitive API and implement operation() to set the snapshot operation summary.

The Apply() pipeline:
Filter data manifests (via data_filter_manager_)
Compute min data sequence number and set up delete filter cleanup
Filter delete manifests (via delete_filter_manager_)
Write new data manifests (cached for commit retry)
Write new delete manifests (cached for commit retry)
Merge data manifests (via data_merge_manager_)
Merge delete manifests (via delete_merge_manager_)

TODO(Guotao): Java MergingSnapshotProducer overrides updateEvent() to return a CreateSnapshotEvent(tableName, operation, snapshotId, sequenceNumber, summary) for commit listeners. The C++ update framework does not yet have an event notification mechanism, so this is intentionally not implemented here. Add it once an equivalent CreateSnapshotEvent / listener facility exists.
